Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,11 +1,33 @@
 {# 
   ANALYSIS OF index_template.jinja
 
   1. Template Imports and Metadata:
-<!doctype html>
-<html lang="en">
+     - Imports gallery_macros.jinja as gallery_macros for gallery rendering.
+     - Sets up HTML5 doctype and language.
+     - Head includes meta tags for charset, viewport, Open Graph, and Twitter for SEO/social sharing.
+     - Loads Bootstrap 4.3.1, PhotoSwipe, and custom CSS.
+     - Loads Oswald font from Google Fonts.
+     - Title is set to a stylized Unicode string.
 
+  2. Body Structure:
+     - Two floating buttons: "Top" and "Jump Down" for navigation.
+     - Navigation bar uses Bootstrap classes, with links to Home, Gallery, Shorts, Videos, and a (possibly empty) form link.
+     - Main content area uses Bootstrap grid (container-fluid, row, col).
+     - Gallery section is rendered via gallery_macros.section macro, passing in images and config.
+     - The gallery macro is called twice: once inside the grid, once after a comment ("GALLERY DESCRIPTIONS"). This may be redundant.
+
+  3. PhotoSwipe Lightbox:
+     - Includes the required PhotoSwipe HTML structure for image lightbox functionality.
+
+  4. Footer:
+     - Simple footer with a link to the main site.
+
+  5. Scripts:
+     - Loads jQuery, Popper.js, Bootstrap JS, PhotoSwipe, and a custom main.js.
+     - Inline JS for:
+         - Showing/hiding "Top" and "Jump Down" buttons on scroll.
+         - Scrolling to top or down one viewport on button click.
 <head>
   <meta charset="utf-8">
   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no">

Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,33 +1,9 @@
-{# 
-  ANALYSIS OF index_template.jinja
+{% import 'gallery_macros.jinja' as gallery_macros %}
 
-  1. Template Imports and Metadata:
-     - Imports gallery_macros.jinja as gallery_macros for gallery rendering.
-     - Sets up HTML5 doctype and language.
-     - Head includes meta tags for charset, viewport, Open Graph, and Twitter for SEO/social sharing.
-     - Loads Bootstrap 4.3.1, PhotoSwipe, and custom CSS.
-     - Loads Oswald font from Google Fonts.
-     - Title is set to a stylized Unicode string.
+<!doctype html>
+<html lang="en">
 
-  2. Body Structure:
-     - Two floating buttons: "Top" and "Jump Down" for navigation.
-     - Navigation bar uses Bootstrap classes, with links to Home, Gallery, Shorts, Videos, and a (possibly empty) form link.
-     - Main content area uses Bootstrap grid (container-fluid, row, col).
-     - Gallery section is rendered via gallery_macros.section macro, passing in images and config.
-     - The gallery macro is called twice: once inside the grid, once after a comment ("GALLERY DESCRIPTIONS"). This may be redundant.
-
-  3. PhotoSwipe Lightbox:
-     - Includes the required PhotoSwipe HTML structure for image lightbox functionality.
-
-  4. Footer:
-     - Simple footer with a link to the main site.
-
-  5. Scripts:
-     - Loads jQuery, Popper.js, Bootstrap JS, PhotoSwipe, and a custom main.js.
-     - Inline JS for:
-         - Showing/hiding "Top" and "Jump Down" buttons on scroll.
-         - Scrolling to top or down one viewport on button click.
 <head>
   <meta charset="utf-8">
   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no">

Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,9 +1,37 @@
 {% import 'gallery_macros.jinja' as gallery_macros %}
 
-<!doctype html>
+<!DOCTYPE html>
 <html lang="en">
+<head>
+    <meta charset="utf-8">
+    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no">
 
+    <meta property="og:title" content="{{ gallery_config['title'] }}">
+    <meta property="og:description" content="{{ gallery_config['description'] }}">
+    <meta property="og:image" content="{{ gallery_config['url'] }}/images/photos/{{ background_photo }}">
+    <meta property="og:url" content="{{ gallery_config['url'] }}">
+    <meta property="og:site_name" content="{{ gallery_config['title'] }}">
+
+    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
+    <meta name="twitter:image:alt" content="{{ gallery_config['title'] }}">
+
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://stackpath.bootstrapcdn.com/bootstrap/4.3.1/css/bootstrap.min.css" integrity="sha384-ggOyR0iXCbMQv3Xipma34MD+dH/1fQ784/j6cY/iJTQUOhcWr7x9JvoRxT2MZw1T" crossorigin="anonymous">
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/photoswipe.css">
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/default-skin.css">
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/main.css">
+    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Oswald:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
+
+    <title>Λ∀ʌ†ʌʀ 🦄 ∆ʀ†s</title>
+
+    {# These definitions are pulled out of the .css file here, so that the background image can be templated. #}
+</head>
+<body>
+    <button onclick="topFunction()" id="myBtn" title="Go to top" aria-label="Go to top">Top</button>
+    <button onclick="jumpDown()" id="jumpBtn" title="Down" aria-label="Down">Jump Down</button>
+
+    <!-- Navigation menu -->
+    <nav class="navbar navbar-expand-lg navbar-dark">
 <head>
   <meta charset="utf-8">
   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no">
